summary: Comprehensive backend test of all new SellerHub features (withdrawals 3-methods, ref_no, validation, admin payout view, approve/reject, wallet txn filter, stock decrement bug, feedback CRUD, archived hard-delete, admin wallet adjust). 19/19 backend tests PASSED. Frontend forgot-password page verified visually. Frontend integration testing BLOCKED: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL in /app/frontend/.env points to https://seller-hub-228.preview.emergentagent.com which returns 404 for all /api/* routes. The actual working backend is at https://withdrawal-system-v2.preview.emergentagent.com (matches review_request). As a result, login fails on the served frontend, so /withdrawals, /sellers, /listings, /wallet/withdraw, /feedback pages could not be exercised end-to-end.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend is built against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://seller-hub-228.preview.emergentagent.com but that host returns 404 for /api/*. Confirmed by network log: POST seller-hub-228/api/auth/login -> 404. Working backend is on https://withdrawal-system-v2.preview.emergentagent.com. Login toast 'Login failed' shown.

action_items: URGENT: Fix /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to https://withdrawal-system-v2.preview.emergentagent.com (or whatever the correct ingress is) and restart frontend. Without this, no authenticated UI flow works.

After URL fix, re-run frontend smoke test of /withdrawals (Ref column + modal), /sellers (open-feedback modal), /listings archived (hard-del button), /wallet/withdraw (rate-monday + rate-other + 3 method tabs), /feedback (stat cards).
Backend logic is fully verified for all new features – no backend action items.
critical_code_review_comments: WithdrawIn validation, ref_no generation (WD- + 8 hex), wallet hold/refund, transactions filter, listing hard-delete on archived, feedback CRUD, admin wallet adjust – all working as designed and persistence verified via GET.
Frontend bundle was probably built before .env was finalized; ensure CI/deploy uses the latest env.

success_rate.frontend: Blocked - cannot login due to wrong REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL

test_credentials: Admin: admin@sellerhub.io / Admin@12345 (seeded). Sellers registered dynamically per test run.
seed_data_creation: Tests register fresh seller per module run (seller_<uuid>@sellerhub.io) and create listings/feedback/withdrawals scoped to that seller, then verify via GET. No prod data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://withdrawal-system-v2.preview.emergentagent.com works for all new endpoints; tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py and can be re-run with TEST_BACKEND_URL env override. Frontend cannot be tested until /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL points to the working backend. After fix, focus E2E on: (1) admin login -> /withdrawals shows ref_no + eye opens [data-testid=withdrawal-modal]; (2) /sellers shows [data-testid=open-feedback-<sid>] and modal submit; (3) /listings archived tab shows [data-testid=hard-del-<id>]; (4) /wallet/withdraw shows [data-testid=rate-monday] [data-testid=rate-other] + 3 method tabs toggling field set; (5) seller /feedback shows stat-completed/positive/negative/score cards.
rca of the issue: RCA: /app/frontend/.env has REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://seller-hub-228.preview.emergentagent.com. That hostname only serves the static frontend; its ingress does NOT forward /api/* to backend (returns 'page not found'). Backend ingress is on a different host (withdrawal-system-v2). Browser network trace shows: POST https://seller-hub-228.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth/login -> HTTP 404. Mitigation: update REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to the correct ingress and restart frontend (supervisor reload). Repro: open /login, submit any credentials, observe 'Login failed' toast and 404 in console.
